page_content:
GVPT318 Classroom to Careers (1 Credit) Embarking on a career post-college is both an exhilarating and a challenging journey. This course is designed to demystify the transition from university to professional life for GVPT students. Throughout the course, students will engage in a structured process to identify their professional interests and navigate through potential career avenues. Additionally, weekly sessions will feature in-person meetings with GVPT alumni from diverse sectors, offering students a unique opportunity to gain insights from several real-world professional trajectories. By the course's conclusion, students will not only have a framework for career planning but also gain ﬁrsthand narratives that bridge the gap between academic study and professional endeavor. Restriction: Must be in Government and Politics program. Repeatable to: 2 credits if content differs.

GVPT349 Topics in Political Philosophy (3 Credits) The study of topics in political philosophy. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
